decision.recommendation: Apply only if civil contractor registration, road work completion certificates, equipment availability, labour safety compliance, and EMD funds are ready.

beforeApply.label: GST and PAN documents are ready
Machinery and equipment list is available
Labour safety compliance documents are available

source.title: Contractor Registration
source.text: The bidder must be registered as a civil contractor with competent authority.

source.title: Statutory Documents
source.text: GST registration certificate and PAN copy shall be enclosed with the technical bid.

source.title: Earnest Money Deposit
source.text: Earnest Money Deposit of ₹1,56,000 shall be paid online before bid submission.

source.title: Similar Work Experience
source.text: The bidder shall have successfully completed similar road repair or resurfacing works during the last five years.

documents.name: Machinery and Equipment Ownership / Lease Proof

source.title: Machinery Requirement
source.text: The bidder shall submit details of road roller, bitumen sprayer, cutting machine and other required machinery owned or leased.

source.title: Labour Safety
source.text: The contractor shall comply with applicable labour laws, safety norms and provide protective equipment to workers at site.

eligibility.text: The contractor must comply with labour laws and site safety norms.

source.title: Labour Safety
source.text: The contractor shall comply with applicable labour laws, safety norms and provide protective equipment to workers at site.

source.title: Estimated Work Value
source.text: The estimated cost of road repair work is ₹78 lakh inclusive of material, labour, machinery and taxes.

source.title: Earnest Money Deposit
source.text: Earnest Money Deposit of ₹1,56,000 shall be paid online before bid submission.

source.title: Retention Money
source.text: Retention money at 5% shall be deducted from contractor bills and released after defect liability obligations.

source.title: Defect Liability
source.text: The contractor shall maintain repaired road stretches during defect liability period of twelve months after completion.

source.title: Liquidated Damages
source.text: Delay in completion shall attract liquidated damages as per tender conditions.

technical.requirement: Patch repair and resurfacing of Ward 12 internal roads

source.title: Scope of Work
source.text: The work includes pothole repair, surface dressing and resurfacing of identified internal roads in Ward 12.

technical.requirement: Completion within 45 days from work order

source.title: Completion Period
source.text: The contractor shall complete the road repair work within 45 days from the date of work order.

technical.requirement: Road roller, bitumen sprayer and cutting machine required

source.text: The bidder shall submit details of road roller, bitumen sprayer, cutting machine and other required machinery owned or leased.

missingInformation: Exact liquidated damages percentage is not clearly summarized
Material grade acceptance test process needs clarification
Traffic diversion responsibility is not fully specified
Running bill payment schedule is unclear
departmentQuestions: Will equivalent registration from another municipal authority be accepted?
Who will provide traffic police permissions during execution?
What tests are required for material acceptance?
Can work timeline be extended for heavy rain days?
When will retention money be released?
proposalDraft:
Dear Sir/Madam,

We are pleased to submit our proposal for road repair work for Ward 12 against tender reference NMC/ROADS/2026/118. We confirm that we have reviewed the eligibility criteria, technical requirements, financial terms, delivery obligations, and compliance documents mentioned in the tender.

We undertake to submit all required certificates, declarations, financial documents, and technical compliance details as part of the bid. We also confirm our ability to execute the work within the prescribed timeline subject to final award and work order.

Regards,
Authorized Signatory
